description_long: This is a stylized humanoid doll with a fantasy-inspired appearance, featuring large, pale blue horns curving upward from its head and short, teal hair styled in a voluminous, layered fashion. The doll wears a light green tunic with puffed short sleeves, cinched at the waist with a brown belt, and matching green shorts. Its arms are outstretched, revealing brown fingerless gloves and a pair of thigh-high black stockings with garter straps. The face is expressive, with large, light blue eyes, a small nose, and a neutral mouth, giving it a whimsical, animated look. The boots are black and knee-high, complementing the overall color palette. The surface appears smooth and matte, typical of high-quality collectible figures or toys.
description: A fantasy-themed humanoid doll with teal hair, large blue horns, a green tunic, and black thigh-high boots. The figure has a whimsical, animated face and detailed clothing accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's expressive face, large horns, teal hair, green tunic, brown belt, and outstretched arms with gloves and thigh-high boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the horns, the layered hairstyle, and the silhouette of the tunic and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the full volume of the hair, the back of the tunic, and the alignment of the boots and stockings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the horns, hairstyle, and the side seam of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_style: Fantasy-inspired attire with a light green tunic featuring puffed short sleeves, a brown belt, green shorts, black thigh-high stockings with garter straps, brown fingerless gloves, and black knee-high boots. The style is reminiscent of RPG or anime character designs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso erect. The pose is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with wide, open eyes, relaxed mouth, and slightly raised eyebrows, conveying a calm and approachable demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Short, voluminous teal hair styled in layered, outward-swept sections with two large, pale blue upward-curving horns protruding from the head.
